name: naveencodes-ai
description: NaveenCodes AI Dev OS monorepo foundation

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @naveencodes/core && npm run build --workspace @naveencodes/ai && npm run build --workspace @naveencodes/mcp && npm run build --workspace @naveencodes/reports && npm run build --workspace @naveencodes/auth && npm run build --workspace @naveencodes/backend && npm run build --workspace @naveencodes/frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @naveencodes/frontend" "npm run dev --workspace @naveencodes/backend"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @naveencodes/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @naveencodes/ai && npm run typecheck --workspace @naveencodes/mcp && npm run typecheck --workspace @naveencodes/reports && npm run typecheck --workspace @naveencodes/auth && npm run typecheck --workspace @naveencodes/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @naveencodes/frontend
